vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Perdió los nervios cuando nadie escuchó.

vocabulary.sentence: He apologised and tried to make amends.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Se disculpó e intentó enmendarlo.

vocabulary.sentence: Please do not take offence at my comment.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Por favor no te ofendas por mi comentario.

vocabulary.sentence: I was taken aback by his honesty.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Me quedé sorprendido por su honestidad.

vocabulary.sentence: He comes across as confident but friendly.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Da la impresión de ser seguro pero amable.

vocabulary.sentence: She finally opened up about her worries.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Finalmente se abrió sobre sus preocupaciones.

vocabulary.sentence: He needs to let go of the past.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Necesita dejar atrás el pasado.

vocabulary.sentence: They should not look down on people with less money.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: No deberían menospreciar a las personas con menos dinero.

category: Phrasal verbs y expresiones idiomáticas C1

vocabulary.sentence: I came across an old photo while cleaning.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Encontré una foto antigua por casualidad mientras limpiaba.

vocabulary.sentence: She came up with a brilliant solution.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Se le ocurrió una solución brillante.

vocabulary.sentence: He brought up the issue during the meeting.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Sacó el tema durante la reunión.

vocabulary.sentence: The policy brought about significant change.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: La política provocó un cambio significativo.

vocabulary.sentence: The meeting was brought forward to Monday.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: La reunión se adelantó al lunes.

vocabulary.sentence: Despite the noise, we carried on working.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: A pesar del ruido, seguimos trabajando.

vocabulary.sentence: The scientists carried out an experiment.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Los científicos llevaron a cabo un experimento.

vocabulary.sentence: The decision comes down to cost.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: La decisión se reduce al coste.

vocabulary.sentence: She came down with flu before the trip.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Cayó enferma de gripe antes del viaje.

vocabulary.sentence: He fell behind with his coursework.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Se quedó atrás con sus trabajos del curso.

vocabulary.sentence: He got away with cheating in the test.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Se salió con la suya haciendo trampa en el examen.

vocabulary.sentence: I can get by in French, but I am not fluent.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Me apaño en francés, pero no hablo con fluidez.

vocabulary.sentence: It took her a long time to get over the shock.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Le llevó mucho tiempo superar el impacto.

vocabulary.sentence: The company gave in to public pressure.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: La empresa cedió ante la presión pública.

vocabulary.sentence: The title gives away the ending.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: El título revela el final.

vocabulary.sentence: Fear can hold back talented students.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: El miedo puede frenar a estudiantes con talento.

vocabulary.sentence: It is hard to keep up with new technology.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Es difícil mantenerse al día con la nueva tecnología.

vocabulary.sentence: She looks back on her childhood with affection.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Recuerda su infancia con cariño.

vocabulary.sentence: I could not make out what he was saying.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: No pude entender lo que estaba diciendo.

vocabulary.sentence: The bad reviews put me off seeing the film.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Las malas críticas me quitaron las ganas de ver la película.

vocabulary.sentence: I ran into an old colleague at the station.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Me encontré con un antiguo compañero en la estación.

vocabulary.sentence: Set aside some time for revision.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Reserva algo de tiempo para repasar.

vocabulary.sentence: She took on more responsibility at work.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Asumió más responsabilidad en el trabajo.

vocabulary.sentence: He turned down the job offer.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Rechazó la oferta de trabajo.

vocabulary.sentence: The long journey wore us out.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: El largo viaje nos agotó.

vocabulary.sentence: There is a subtle difference between the two words.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Hay una diferencia sutil entre las dos palabras.

vocabulary.sentence: His answer was too vague to be useful.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Su respuesta fue demasiado vaga para ser útil.

vocabulary.sentence: The instructions were explicit and easy to follow.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Las instrucciones eran explícitas y fáciles de seguir.

vocabulary.sentence: There was an implicit criticism in her comment.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Había una crítica implícita en su comentario.

vocabulary.sentence: The journey takes roughly two hours.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: El viaje dura aproximadamente dos horas.

vocabulary.sentence: That is precisely what I meant.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Eso es precisamente lo que quería decir.

vocabulary.sentence: The price has increased considerably.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: El precio ha aumentado considerablemente.

vocabulary.sentence: The second option is slightly cheaper.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: La segunda opción es ligeramente más barata.

vocabulary.sentence: The patient recovered remarkably quickly.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: El paciente se recuperó notablemente rápido.

vocabulary.sentence: The village was virtually empty in winter.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: El pueblo estaba prácticamente vacío en invierno.

vocabulary.sentence: The new rules substantially changed the system.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Las nuevas normas cambiaron sustancialmente el sistema.

vocabulary.sentence: It is arguably the best film of the year.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Posiblemente sea la mejor película del año.

vocabulary.sentence: Apparently, the train has been delayed.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Al parecer, el tren se ha retrasado.

vocabulary.sentence: Presumably, they left early to avoid traffic.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Presumiblemente salieron temprano para evitar el tráfico.

vocabulary.sentence: This is undoubtedly a serious problem.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Esto es sin duda un problema serio.

vocabulary.sentence: Mistakes will inevitably happen during the process.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Los errores ocurrirán inevitablemente durante el proceso.

vocabulary.sentence: She was reluctant to talk about the incident.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Era reacia a hablar del incidente.

vocabulary.sentence: He is keen to start the new project.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Tiene muchas ganas de empezar el nuevo proyecto.

vocabulary.sentence: The system is liable to errors if used incorrectly.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: El sistema es propenso a errores si se usa mal.

vocabulary.sentence: The plan is bound to cause debate.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: El plan seguro que causará debate.

vocabulary.sentence: The proposal is ambitious but feasible.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: La propuesta es ambiciosa pero viable.

vocabulary.sentence: Her explanation sounds plausible.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Su explicación suena plausible.

vocabulary.sentence: The report gives a comprehensive overview.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: El informe ofrece una visión completa.

vocabulary.sentence: The process is fairly straightforward.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: El proceso es bastante sencillo.

vocabulary.sentence: Entering the data by hand was tedious.
vocabulary.sentence_spanish: Introducir los datos a mano fue tedioso.
